_description: Mild transient elevation — resolving. Repeat LFTs improved. Originally found during viral illness, now recovering. No risk factors. Expected: no dilemma, straightforward, monitoring NOT required → discharge to GP.
_expected_path: GP_REFERRAL → EXTRACT → RED_FLAG(no) → TRIAGE → GP_LETTER → LFT_PATTERN(hepatitic) → HEPATITIC_INVESTIGATIONS → DILEMMA(no) → CONSULTATION → EDUCATION → MONITORING(no) → DISCHARGE_TO_GP

symptoms: Mildly elevated ALT found incidentally during routine bloods 3 months ago following a viral illness (gastroenteritis)
Repeat LFTs show significant improvement — ALT has fallen from 85 to 48 IU/L over 3 months
Patient is well, asymptomatic, no ongoing symptoms
GP requesting confirmation that no further hepatology follow-up is needed
